name: FNB Inflation ETF
dividend: Quarterly | Last 4: Dec 2025: 11.82 cpu, Sep 2025: 23.87 cpu, Jun 2025: 13.06 cpu, Mar 2025: 22.89 cpu
index_rules: To provide investors with a real rate of return above inflation (CPI) through exposure to a diversified portfolio of government inflation-linked bonds. Tracks the FTSE/JSE IGOV Index, a weighted basket of SA government ILBs, in proportion to index weightings. Effective 1 July 2020 the benchmark changed from GILBx to IGOV.
